allow: Bash(echo "=== getProjectMetrics ===" && curl -s "http://localhost:9000/api/measures/component?component=sonarqube-mcp-demo&metricKeys=bugs,vulnerabilities,code_smells,coverage,duplicated_lines_density,ncloc,sqale_rating,reliability_rating,security_rating,alert_status" -H "Authorization: Basic $\(echo -n 'squ_16c95e0325227fb5a46369b1f5f5c2d1afc0752b:' | base64\)" | python -m json.tool 2>&1)

Bash(echo "=== getQualityGateStatus ===" && curl -s "http://localhost:9000/api/qualitygates/project_status?projectKey=sonarqube-mcp-demo" -H "Authorization: Basic $\(echo -n 'squ_16c95e0325227fb5a46369b1f5f5c2d1afc0752b:' | base64\)" | python -m json.tool && echo "" && echo "=== searchIssues \(all\) ===" && curl -s "http://localhost:9000/api/issues/search?componentKeys=sonarqube-mcp-demo&ps=20" -H "Authorization: Basic $\(echo -n 'squ_16c95e0325227fb5a46369b1f5f5c2d1afc0752b:' | base64\)" | python -m json.tool 2>&1)

Bash(sleep 15 && curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" http://localhost:8080/actuator/health 2>/dev/null || curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" http://localhost:8080/ 2>/dev/null; echo "" && tail -20 "C:\\Users\\Deepak\\Code\\SonarQubeMCP\\SonarqubeMcpDemo\\SonarqubeMcpDemo\\app.log" 2>&1)
Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8080/chat -H "Content-Type: text/plain" -d "What projects are available in SonarQube?" 2>&1)
Bash(taskkill /F /FI "WINDOWTITLE eq *SonarqubeMcpDemo*" 2>&1; taskkill /F /FI "IMAGENAME eq java.exe" 2>&1; echo "done")
Bash(echo "=== TEST 1: List Projects ===" && curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8080/chat -H "Content-Type: text/plain" -d "What projects are available in SonarQube?" 2>&1)
Bash(echo "=== TEST 2: Project Metrics ===" && curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8080/chat -H "Content-Type: text/plain" -d "What are the quality metrics for sonarqube-mcp-demo?" 2>&1)
